entry.title: Re: Can't instantiate a fragment after Destory it
entry.content: I'm destroying the view because it became useless 99% of the time. I'm not destroying the fragment because, reading the docs, I understood that 'destroy view implies destroy fragment.'

entry.title: Re: What product do you register HANA Cockpit as on the S...
entry.content:
Hello,

You can try "SAP HANA, platform edition". SAP HANA cockpit is under the scope of SAP HANA Platform, where you can find the appropriate path and component to report a case to SAP Support.

br,
Rainie

entry.title: Payment schedule
entry.content:
Payment schedule.

First step - A purchase order was created, with an account assignment category for the project (WBS element) and mandatory down payments on the items of the purchase order.

The initial data is as follows:

Purchase cost – 90,000.00

Expected delivery date 01.10.2025

Expected payment date of the Advance payment 60% - 01.06.2025

Expected post-payment date in 90 days from the delivery date – 30.12.2025

 

Accordingly, the expected financing (liability) for the order for 90,000.00 by period looks as follows:

01.06.2025 – 54,000.00

30.12.2025 – 36,000.00

In the CJIA report, the financial liability (type 51) for the above order is displayed in the 1st line with the expected payment date as 30.12.2025 – 90,000.00, which does not comply with the terms of the contract and does not take into account the need to pay an advance of 54,000.00 on 01.06.2025, as well as the payment amount on 31.12.2025 is incorrectly formed (correctly 36,000.00).

 

How to ensure the reflection of the expected financing in terms of periods, taking into account advance payments?

entry.title: Re: How to develop a custom program to find 'Where Used List' of custom tables
entry.content: Use the SQL trace and the ABAP trace to see how the standard works. There are probably several answers in the forum how it works, which may be difficult to find, so search something like RS_EU_CROSSREF, WBCROSSGT. Note that they may work or not depending on your ABAP version.

entry.title: Re: Can't instantiate a fragment after Destory it
entry.content: What about destryoing the view? I need to do it because in my webapp there are a lot of views that can be used and I need to destroy them if no longer usefull; users can still use them but that could be very rare. The fragment issue occurs when i destroy the view and then i re-istanziate it

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)
entry.content:
APIManagement.Selfservice.Administrator role collection is needed to work on the API exercise.

After assigning the role collection, you need to logout and login in Integration Suite page. And click Setting --> API. There is a dialog box telling you that the API is in provision. Then take some time and logout/login again, you will see the completed Menu as in the exercise.

entry.title: Is there any API that can list all versions of an Artifact?
entry.content:
When using APIs within 'Integration Content', sometimes should pass 'Version'.

However, there are chances that I don't know versions of a specific Artifact(Integration Flow, Script Collection, etc...), or I don't want to get the latest version, but a previous version:

For example, I want to list all versions of a Artifact, like here ['5.2.0', '1.0.8', ...], then I choose to send a GET request for version '1.0.0'.

Is it possible that I can get all existing Versions of an Artifact?

entry.title: Re: Data Initialization Issue in CAP Java Project with HA...
entry.content:
Hi @stefaniaZ,

I just saw this recent blog about data loss when deploying from CAP to HANA .

The problem looks similar, I hope this helps.

entry.title: Need to Get a Comment field in Workflow when HR Tries to Approve/Decline leaves.
entry.content:
Hi All,

The required flow is:

When the employee applies a leave it should flow to HR group.
The requirement is to get or add a mandatory remarks option for HR and it is a one level approval mechanism.
When the HR approves the leave, the mail notification in cc should flow to IRM/HR Team and whatever the comment updated by HR has to be visible or trigger in cc mail notification only to HR Team not the manager.

Able to configure all the mechanism except getting the comment field in workflow and capturing the mandatory comment flowing to HR Team in mail part. Whatever the comments added by HR need to be captured/Updated  in the triggered mail(mail received by the HR-Team).

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Data Initialization Issue in CAP Java Project with HA...
entry.content:
Hi valentincadart,

thanks so much.

 

Stefania

entry.title: Two OPEN SQl statements with same WHERE condition, different Columns but returning different numbers
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help with the OPEN SQL statements shared below. I'm comparing two SQL statements that use the same WHERE condition but have different numbers of columns. I expect both statements to return the same number of records since the WHERE condition is the same. However, when I execute the SQL statements, I find that the number of records returned is different. Can someone explain why this is happening?

SELECT plpo~plnty,
           plpo~plnnr,
           plpo~plnkn,
           plpo~zaehl,
           plpo~vgw01,
           plpo~vgw02,
           plpo~vgw03,
           plpo~bmsch,
           plpo~vornr,
           plpo~vge01,
           plpo~vge02,
           plpo~vge03,
           plpo~steus,
           plas~loekz,
           plas~plnfl,
           plas~plnal,
           crhd~arbpl,
           crhd~objid
       FROM plpo
          INNER JOIN plas ON plpo~plnty = plas~plnty
           AND plpo~plnnr = plas~plnnr
           AND plpo~plnkn = plas~plnkn
           AND plpo~zaehl = plas~zaehl
         INNER JOIN crhd ON plpo~arbid = crhd~objid
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @t_operazioni
         WHERE plpo~plnty = @t_operazioni-plnty
           AND plpo~plnnr = @t_operazioni-plnnr
           AND plas~plnal = @t_operazioni-plnal
           AND plpo~steus <> 'ZP00'
           AND plas~loekz IS INITIAL
           AND plas~plnfl = '000000'
      INTO TABLE @DATA(t_plpo).


    SELECT
           plpo~vgw01,
           plpo~vgw02,
           plpo~vgw03,
           plpo~bmsch,
           plpo~vornr,
           plpo~vge01,
           plpo~vge02,
           plpo~vge03,
           crhd~arbpl

            FROM plpo
           INNER JOIN plas ON plpo~plnty = plas~plnty
                         AND plpo~plnnr = plas~plnnr
                         AND plpo~plnkn = plas~plnkn
                         AND plpo~zaehl = plas~zaehl
          INNER  JOIN crhd ON plpo~arbid = crhd~objid
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @t_operazioni
            WHERE plpo~plnty = @t_operazioni-plnty AND
                plpo~plnnr = @t_operazioni-plnnr AND
                plas~plnal = @t_operazioni-plnal AND
                plpo~steus <> 'ZP00' AND
                plas~loekz IS INITIAL AND
                plas~plnfl = '000000'
    INTO TABLE @DATA(t_plpo2).

entry.title: Re: ABAP code or scripting in CI-DS where source and target both are IBP
entry.content:
Hi April,

So if I have to achieve complex logic in IBP source-target scenario, I have to rely only on the transforms and the functions? I know that there are options to write post and pre-load scripts. Is there anything similar that will be called at each iteration of records, instead of only at the beginning and end?

Regards,

Aparna B

entry.content: any solution?

entry.title: Re: Create 2 bits from a cit but to different business pa...
entry.content:
Hi Eric,

A follow-up question on this. Since the contract is created with a particular Partner and CA, will there be any issue in CI after the BIT has been generated? Since the partner and Contract Account do not belong to the provider contract, will there be any issues with BIT creation, Billing, or Invoicing?

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: What’s New as of 2025-06-09?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community members!

Here again to give you the latest updates in SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud – Standard Model. From Modeling screen, Administration screens such as: Teams and Settings, and Show Screen (Pivot Mode = On).

Without further ado, Let’s dive into What’s New in SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model.

 

Modeling

1. New mapping fields are now available for RFA FI-GL and RFA FI-GLI

As of today, Remote Function Adapter types, Finance General Ledger and Finance General Ledger Items, now have both Financial Period and Tax Code fields which modelers can now use when posting documents.

Finance General Ledger

header-fis_periodFiscal Period
accountgl[ 1 ]-tax_codeTax on Sales/Purchases Code
accountgl[ 2 ]-tax_codeTax on Sales/Purchases Code

Finance General Ledger Items

header-fis_periodFiscal Period
accountgl-tax_codeTax on Sales/Purchases Code

2. Modeling Update (Join)

For SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model modelers, get ready to experience the environment modeling like never before! We're incredibly excited to unveil our latest upgrade, packed with innovative features designed to provide better user experience and satisfaction! For full details about this update, visit SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: Modeling Update (Join)

 

Show Screen (Pivot Mode = On)

As we know, when the pivot mode is set to "On" in the Show screen, the can show the totals for a particular column.

As an addition to this feature, users will now be able to customize the "Result" label for totals by following the simple steps below.

  1. Choose the column header option
  2. Choose Change Aggregation Label and adjust the label text
  3. and then choose Confirm

 

Teams

As part of the continuous enhancement to have flexibility in team management, the team collection which can contain child teams is now possible in the application. 

For the configuration and more info, you may refer to SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model – Introducing Team Collection blogpost.

 

Settings Screen

1. Email Notifications Update

To align with SAP's email handling capabilities, we are now transitioning from the current SAP SMTP service to a new solution, ANS (Alert Notification Service). For the full details, visit this blogpost SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: 3 Things You Need to Know About the Update in Email Notifications

This update also includes user interface improvements which will provide admin with the ability to choose the configured destination from BTP in the Settings screen.

2. For role collection ADMIN_USER_RESTRICTED, we introduced a small change in its restriction to provide more secure granularity in which this role collection will now not have the ability to perform any password activities such as reset or unlock of the current database user password.

ADMIN_USER_RESTRICTED

This change does not affect other role collections such as:

SETTINGS and ADMIN_USER_ALL

The SETTINGS_READ role will remain the same with read-only access to the Administration Settings screen.

3. SAP Cloud ALM Integration in PaPM Cloud Standard Model

We're excited to announce the integration of SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PaPM) Cloud Standard Model with SAP Cloud ALM. This integration allows you to monitor the health of your PaPM application in one place.

To use this integration, you need to be subscribed to SAP PaPM Cloud and SAP Cloud ALM. The integration focuses on health monitoring, and you can track key aspects like:

  • Connection Monitoring: Checks if PaPM can connect to the database.
  • Availability Monitoring: Confirms the database is running and logs any errors.

In the Administration Settings screen, you can define which destination, previously configured for SAP Cloud ALM in SAP BTP, will be used in PaPM. This new option is available in the "Destination Settings" section. You can choose the destination from a dropdown menu filled with pre-configured SAP BTP destinations. The field allows for quick search. As you type, a dropdown shows filtered results, making it simple to find the desired destination

If the destination name is not specified on the Settings page, the system will automatically check for the existence of the default destination name,  "PaPM_CloudALM," in SAP BTP. The system will also check for the default destination if the user attempts to save an empty destination field. If the default destination is created in SAP BTP, it will be populated in the field. If it is not defined, the field will remain empty.

We have added a field under the Application Shell Integration Settings section where you can add your SAP Cloud ALM link.

When you add a link for SAP Cloud ALM under the Application Shell Integration Settings section, a new tile will be activated in the app switcher on the Shell Page, from which the user can access the SAP Cloud ALM application.

For more information, visit  Settings in the Application Help Portal.  

For more information on integrating SAP Cloud ALM with SAP Profitability and Performance Management and creating a destination for it in SAP BTP, visit  SAP Cloud ALM Setup in the Administration Guide.

That is all! If you want to monitor and recall what are the new features and updates from SAP PaPM Cloud - Standard Model, you may follow the tag PaPMCloudSMWhatsNew thank you for reading!

entry.title: SAP-консультант: хто це та як ним стати
entry.content:
💼SAP-консультант — перспективна професія на стику бізнесу й технологій.

Хто це, які бувають ролі, як увійти в професію та з чого почати - дізнавайтеся на вебінарі від LABA

📅  12 червня, 19:00 за Києвом

👤 Лектор Іван Хряпін, SAP-фінансовий консультант і проєктний менеджер у CRH

Для кого: світчери, SAP-консультанти-початківці, IT-фахівці та бізнес-аналітики

📌 Реєструйтесь за посиланням!

entry.title: Unable to pull the data correctly from LMS report.
entry.content:
Hi,

We have created one LMS custom report in SuccessFactors (Item Completion and Incompletion Report), we are able to pull the report regarding DEBS legal entity(Latest) people but not able to pull regarding DARH Legal Entity(Old) employees from Domain's filter. Also we are able to pull the user's Completion & incompletion courses data from Items filter but not from Domain's filter from user's filter.

FYI: DARH users are already having Past profiles nd now moved from DKSA to DARH and in report we are getting Past assignment's user ID while pulling the report and submitting the criteria from item filter.

Could you please help me on this, that what could be the issue.

Thanks & Best Regards,

Sri Ramya.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2023 Available Now
entry.content:
Dear @igorportu 

thanks for using our offering!

The passwords are listed always in the README - section "user and passwords" - located here:

https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial#user-and-passwords 

Kind regards,
Stephan
SAP - ABAP Cloud Developer Trial Team

entry.title: Re: OdataV2 based API for creating Billing Document
entry.content: Hi, Sudarshan005. I also have the same problem as you. I would like know if you found a way to create billing docs via Odata API. Thanks.

entry.title: Timesheet Module Behavior on Attendance and Leave Collision
entry.content:
Hello Experts,


I’m seeking your guidance regarding a standard behavior observed in the Timesheet module, specifically related to entry blocking when a collision occurs on a single day.

Issue Summary:
When both attendance and leave type (PL, CL,SL, Out Door Duty) or any absences are recorded on the same day, the system flags a collision error. As a result, it blocks timesheet entries for the remaining days of that week. However, once the collision is resolved, the timesheet updates correctly for the entire week.

We understand that this is standard system behavior.

Request for Suggestions:
Is there a way to prevent the system from blocking the remaining days of the week when such a conflict occurs on just one day?

If anyone has implemented a workaround or alternative solution to handle this scenario more gracefully, we would greatly appreciate your insights or suggestions.

entry.title: Custom Field Extension in Quality Notification with Domain-Based Value Help
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

I tried to extend the Quality Notification using the Custom Fields app by adding a new field.
The business requirement is that this custom field should be linked to a standard table using a domain with a value table, similar to how the PS_POSNR domain works.

I noticed that the Custom Fields app allows creating a custom field for a standard business object, and after publishing, the corresponding table shows the Z-field with the assigned standard domain and its associated value table.

Is it possible to simulate this behavior intentionally, ensuring the field uses a domain with a value table, and that it functions the same way?

Release : Sap on premise 2023

Best regards,

Laura

entry.title: Re: Facing issue in SAP CPI trial version
entry.content: I am also facing same issue science Friday. Do you got any solution.

entry.title: Re: Carry Over Leave Balance to Next Year Until Specific Date Automatically using Integration Center

entry.title: Re: Fetching the Count from OData service response
entry.content: I realized, it might be something very easy reply to this. I found out the solution to it. Instead of exploring the formula option, the correct approach was to bind from the Output value of the previous node (Get Records Collection) node:

entry.title: Re: PM Notifications in QMSM table

Thank you for the response!

Can you please let me know why some notifications are not appearing in QMSM table. For these notifications if we go and check QMEL table we find that the field MAKNZ is blank.

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: Re: Verification field on RF screen is not editable

Hi Daniil,

Sorry for late response.  We will use Product field as it is accepting barcode. 

Thank you for your quick help.

Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: Re: Two OPEN SQl statements with same WHERE condition, di...
entry.content:
@Above 

Hi!

You have a "FOR ALL ENTRIES" construct in your SELECT statement and this has the effect that it only gives DISTINCT values back in the results. I don't know the tables involved in your statement but you may need to add whatever the key fields for PLPO are in the field list of your 2nd select to ensure that you get all the expected entries (even if you don't necessarily need the fields in the subsequent logic).

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Error when upload LTMC PIR with condition in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

Here, I meet an issue while uploading PIR, especially in the condition tab. When I create PIR manually, the mandatory price is defined as net price and set by the system as PPR0. 

But when I upload LTMC PIR and input PPR0, this error appears

 

So I added PNP0 as the net price. Then this issue appears

Why I have to maintain PNP0 in my custom pricing procedure? However, when I create PIR manually, I don't have to input PNP0.

Please give me advice related to this issue 

MM Purchasing

entry.title: Re: Working with RAP BO Events end-to-end - Event-driven-architecture - Event framework
entry.content:
Hi @AshishPandey 

There is no "program to run", I'm not even sur what you mean by that. My scenario is end-to-end and all steps for local consumption are included. Please refer to the troubleshooting part of my blog. BGPF needs to be setup properly. If you only can debug via SBGRFCMON then that tells me BGPF is probably not fully setup. Check with your basis. If this doesn't solve the issue, I recommend creating a proper ticket because this is not something that can be helped via text only and needs to be checked in your system.

entry.title: How to access and modify the data in QM01 from user-exit QQMA0001?
entry.content:
Hello,

In transaction QM01 when I create a notification type 'Q3' I want to display a new subscreen with Purchase Doc. and Item similar as 'Q2' type notification. In order to do it I'm trying to do it with user exit QQMA0001 and I'm able to create a new subscreen with these fields but I also want to be get the material and plant from the Purchase Doc/Item which is entered and set it to the next subscreen ( standard ) and I'm not being able to achieve it since the PBO of this standard subscreen is not triggered. I already tried to fill the E_VIQMEL but it's being cleaned and not propagated to this field...

 

Any ideas on how to do it?

entry.title: Add Custom Fields in S/4HANA Public Cloud Migration Cockpit Template for Product Master
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,


We are in the final stages of our S/4HANA Public Cloud go-live and are using the Migration Cockpit (Migrate Your Data App) for product master data migration.


We need to include the following custom fields in the Product master - Source Data template as they are critical for our operations and data integrity:




  2. Document




  4. Basic Data Text




  6. Document Version




  8. Inspection Text




  10. Internal Comment



These fields are PERSON_NAME from a business perspective and essential for completing the product data upload before go-live.


Kindly guide us on the recommended approach:




  • How to enhance the migration template in S/4HANA Public Cloud?




  • Can we use the "Custom Migration Object" app or key user extensibility to achieve this?




  • If not feasible directly, what is the SAP-recommended alternative for loading these fields?



Please treat this as Go-Live Critical and advise urgently.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Add Custom Fields in S/4HANA Public Cloud Migration C...
entry.content:
To add the required Custom fields you can use the app Migration Object Modeler.

Please refer to the below blog for the required steps

How to work with Standard Migration Object in Migration Object Modeler App

entry.title: Re: Issue with Screen Enhancement PBO in SAP AS03 (Asset Master) - On-Premise 2020 vs. 2023
entry.content: That's probably something not obvious, but that only your team can detect, as people here can't log into your system to check the issue. You may contact the SAP Support, open your system, and they will check.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Scheduling Board in Fiori - Alternative Reso...
entry.content:
Dear Thomas,

 

I imagine your issue has been solved as the question was from 2 years ago, however I found your question before I found the solution on SAP support page so I wanted to provide it here as well for other people struggling with the same. What you described is an SAP bug and they have fixed it with SAP note 3501967 https://me.sap.com/notes/3501967

All the best,

 

Radu

entry.title: Re: Issue with Screen Enhancement PBO in SAP AS03 (Asset...
entry.content:
Hi Roger,

          You can check if the PBO is triggering or not by keeping the break point in the PBO for the module in which enhancement code is written thru debugging.

               as you said, no SAP notes are there w.r.t this , you can check with sap service market place. 

Rgds,

G.Khadeer Basha

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required – Agent-on-Fly Configuration for...
entry.content:
Hi @Vera_Jaing,

It is a logical hostname INCECCDBGRP1 for the database cluster, but i have to maintain the cluster-hostname/listener name with listener port in SAP Profile Parameters as per SAP-Note "1772688 - SQL Server Always On Availability Groups and SA" at Profile and Environment Parameters section 

SAPDBHOST = INCECCDBGRP1, 1433

dbs/mss/server = INCECCDBGRP1,1433.

Please find the attached screenshots.

And also checked with IT Team for DNS record. They created the standard DNS record with database cluster hostname INCECCDBGRP1.

OS LevelSAP level

And below are the screenshots of the output of niping command for the hostnames.

ci_host-->inceccdbgrp1ci_host-->inceccsapgrp1db_host-->inceccdbgrp1db_host-->inceccsapgrp1

But able to resolve the hostname through ping command for the logical hostname INCECCDBGRP1

I don't understand, how the hostname INCECCDBGRP1,1433 got created in SLD & LMDB. How to work on these, please help me.

Regards

Srinivas V

entry.title: Re: How to implement custom S/4HANA pricing procedure in the clean core way ?
entry.content:
Hi @Jelena_Perfiljeva,

I would like to know if there is any document from SAP to explain about this Pricing BADI's for On-Premises. I'm checking this KBA - 2756560 where it's clearly mentioned that we should not use these BADIs for O/P. if that's the case, how can we achieve clean core in O/P or Private cloud.

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi.

entry.title: Re: Foreign trade data incomplete for item 10 -URGENT
entry.content: helps , but i can add on more useful information that in my case there was missing Commodity code in field " LEGAL CATEGORIZATION " so you have check also there

entry.title: Re: How to Group Item Records based on Source unique identifier in SAP CPI
entry.content: Hi @Ajit_K_Panda, I happen to have a similar requirement. The links in above answer are no longer working. Do you happen to still have them?

entry.title: Re: Birthday and Anniversary alerts to the employees in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi, thanks a lot for this helpful blog post!

I’ve implemented the birthday alerts successfully using the Integration Center as described. However, I noticed that when an employee's date of birth is February 29, the alert is not triggered in non-leap years (e.g. 2025). 

Is there a recommended way to handle this edge case?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Can employees of a SAP Partner purchase SAP Learning Hub Partner Edition subscriptions?
entry.content: I need to know if employees of a SAP Partner can purchase the Learning Hub Partner Edition subscription as a self service activity?  Or is the only method to get access to have a designated Company account holder purchase LH Partner Editions in bulk and allocate to employees?

entry.title: How to add other depreciation areas to migrated assets and delete data for migrated assets
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support, 

If I want to add value data to other depreciation areas for assets migrated using the "Migration Cockpit" app, is it possible to do so?
(Please tell me if there is a way other than using the "Post Transfer Values ​​- For Legacy Asset" app.) 
If possible, please tell me how to add data. 

 

Also, is it possible to delete data for many assets that have been migrated at once? (Please answer using a method other than using the Reset Transaction Data job template from the app Schedule Accounting Data Corrections.)
If possible, please tell me how to delete data.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add other depreciation areas to migrated asset...
entry.content:
Dear,

Thank you for your question regarding asset value updates and mass deletion options in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 

 

Once assets are migrated and posted using the Migration Cockpit, it is not possible to add values to other depreciation areas using the Migration Cockpit or any other tool except the app: “Post Transfer Values – For Legacy Asset. More information is available here: Post Transfer Values – For Legacy Asset.

 

This is the only supported method for manually updating or posting values to other depreciation areas after migration is complete.

The Migration Cockpit allows you to import values to multiple depreciation areas during the initial migration only. Once assets are posted, no further updates to depreciation areas can be made through migration objects or cockpit re-uploads.

 

The only SAP-supported method for deleting migrated asset data in bulk in the is via the: “Reset Transaction Data” job in the Schedule Accounting Data Corrections app. More information is available here: Reset Transaction Data. 

 

Currently, there is no alternative standard method to mass-delete or reverse migrated assets. Manual deletion via the “Manage Fixed Assets” app is possible but only feasible for a small number of records and only if no postings exist. Manage Fixed Assets. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP
entry.content:
Hello Gallagher,

could you be more specific what do you mean by change of postal code? 

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, changing the country postal code set (i.e., how postal codes are structured and validated for a country) is not directly customizable by customers like in on-premise systems due to the restrictions and standardization imposed by the public cloud model.

SAP maintains postal code validation rules per country based on international standards. These rules are predefined and cannot be changed directly by customers.

But if you want to change postal code of Customer/Vendor you can easily do it via App Manage Business Partner Master Data or Maintain Customer / Supplier

Hope that help,

Best regards, 

Patryk Waledziak

Hi dear users,

We recommend you use the Journal Entry - Post API as a workaround. The error occurs in Fiori apps, but may not the same for APIs.

Best Regards,

Alice

entry.title: Re: How to call local SOAP API in BTP ABAP environment?
entry.content: @MattDion and @Andre_Fischer how should the Outbound service be defined? When starting to make Outbound Service for SOAP, after providing mode 'SOAP' and my definition name (which must end with _SPRX) the ADT asks for 'Service interface' and 'Default path for prefix' what to enter on those attributes? I already have my SRVC activated (created with a WSDL). How would my SRVC become linked to the Outbound interface? I did not found any documentation/sample how this SOAP based Outbound service should be defined. The examples I found were for HTTP Service calls.

entry.title: Why are talent info fields like 'Future Leader' grayed out/non-editable? - A Troubleshooting Guide
entry.content:
When navigating to the Talent Card and attempting to edit talent information, you may find that certain fields—such as Future Leader, Risk of Loss, or others—are grayed out and non-editable. This issue can arise due to several configuration-related reasons. Below are the common causes and how to resolve them. The same troubleshooting approach can be applied to other fields that appear non-editable.

1. Incorrect Configuration in Succession Org Chart XML

If a field is not editable, the first place to check is the Succession Org Chart XML. The field might not be configured correctly based on its data type.

  • For picklist-supported fields, ensure the correct mapping is done.
  • Refer to the official SAP documentation: Succession Data Model to Succession Org Chart Mapping Values of Standard Elements | SAP Help Portal

2. Boolean Field Misconfiguration (e.g., Future Leader)

 

  • If the Future Leader field is grayed out, it could be due to incorrect XML configuration for a boolean field type.

    • Boolean fields require a specific format in the XML for value as true or false.
<iconSetOption index="7" key="futureLeader">
<type>iconset</type>
<label>Future Leader</label>
<iconset>
<icon>
<image>step_green</image>
<label>Yes</label>
<value>true</value>
</icon>
<!--<icon>
<image></image>
<label>No</label>
<value>false</value>
</icon>-->
</iconset>
</iconSetOption>
  • For other field types like Reason for Leaving, ensure:
    • The correct picklist is associated via Manage Business Configuration.
    • The picklist values are properly maintained in Picklist Center, including min, max, and value settings.

3. Missing Field Configuration in Succession Data Model

To display a field in the Talent Card’s Talent Information section, it must be correctly defined in the Succession Data Model.

  • For example, to enable the Future Leader field, ensure the following snippet (or equivalent) is present in the Succession Org Chart XML:
  <standard-element id="futureLeader" required="false" matrix-filter="false">
    <label>Future Leader</label>
  </standard-element>

4. Missing Permissions for the Viewing User

Even if the field is correctly configured, it will remain non-editable if the user lacks the necessary permissions.

  • Navigate to Admin Center > Manage Permission Roles.
  • Under Employee Data > Employee Profile, ensure the user has Edit permissions for the relevant field.

Conclusion

By systematically checking the XML configuration, picklist setup, data model definitions, and user permissions, you can resolve most issues related to non-editable fields in the Talent Card. This approach ensures a consistent and user-friendly experience for talent management in SAP SuccessFactors.

entry.title: Re: PM Notifications in QMSM table
entry.content:
hello jaya ,

if you create a malfunction notification(M2) in IW21 then it will integrate with the quality management module and this is the reason you can able to see the notifications in the table QMSM table. And also the field MAKNZ is blank if you add any taks that needs to be performed on the equipments then the field will MAKNZ will not be blank.

thanks & regards ,
Neeraj.

entry.title: Re: External work centers to our operations in the work o...
entry.content:
to create a work center you just need to use t-code IR01 and here the plant and name of work center needs to created and also cross check with the FICO team for activity types so that the costing will be done here .

Enter plant--

Work center Name- name of the work center

Work center cat.-- category of work center eg 0001 for machine

in Basic data view enter following details

Person responsible--

Usage--eg 009 all task list types

Standard value key-- eg SAP1

Default values view

Control Key-- pp01 for InHouse production

setup--eg MIN

Machine--eg MIN

Labor-- eg MIN

Capacities view

Capacity category-001 for machine

setup formula--SAP005 for set up requirements

Processing formula--SAP006 for machine requirements

hit enter and in the work cemter capacity maintain the following:

Base unit of measure -- eg HR

Start time--

Finish time--

Length of breaks--

capacity utilization--100 for 100% utilization

No of indiv cap--eg 1 or total no of capacities

Scheduling View

Capacity category- 001 for machine

Setup formula -- SAP001 for prod set up time

Processing formula-- SAP002 for machine time

Costing view

Controlling area-- Check with FICO team

Cost center-- check with FICO team

Setup avtivity type - acvtivity unit-- formula--SAP001

Machine avtivity type - acvtivity unit-- formula--SAP002

Labor avtivity type - acvtivity unit-- formula--SAP003

entry.title: Re: How to add public dimension into SAP Analytics Cloud...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply. I've already figure it out.

entry.title: Re: How to add public dimension into SAP Analytics Cloud...
entry.content:
Solution: I expected the public dimension’s columns to appear in the model structure view, but they don’t; they’re only available in the stories.
Another tip: the matching column of the fact dataset (either in SAC or in the data source) must be duplicated to keep it available for building charts.

entry.title: Issue with WRITE statement
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am facing an issue with below WRITE statement, it behaves differently for the 2 different invoices and both invoices belongs to same country and in the logic i did not see any SET COUNTRY statement also. For the 1st invoice date is appearing as 06/05/2025 and for the 2nd invoice date is appearing as 06.05.2025. Please share your suggestions.

write <gs_vbdkr>-fkdat to lv_date.

Transaction: VF02->Repeat Output

entry.title: Help Needed: How to Get Last Purchase Price of Product in SAP ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently facing a challenge in SAP Business ByDesign (SAP ByD). Our costing team requires a report that shows the latest purchase price of each product — ideally the last 3 purchase entries, including:

  • Purchase Rate (Net Price)

  • Supplier Code

  • Quantity

Currently, we are able to see full purchase history, but there is no direct way to filter for only the latest entries. For example, if the last purchase was made a year ago, we still want that to show — but we don’t want the full history, only the most recent purchase(s).

entry.title: SAP Signavio: How to Convert yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss (String) to yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss (Timestamp)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am implementing a table from the SAP Signavio process data pipeline, Process Intelligence, SAP Signavio.

I am trying to convert yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss (String) UTC to yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss (Timestamp) JST, but I am unable to resolve the error. Does anyone have any insights?

Data Sample: 2024-11-18T00:33:25 (String), UTC ←"Note that there is a 'T' character between the date and time."
Expected Result: 2024-11-18 00:33:25 (Timestamp), JST

Current SQL Statement:

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN "OH"."createddate" IS NULL THEN NULL
        WHEN "OH"."createddate" = '[Y]' THEN NULL
        WHEN "OH"."createddate" LIKE '____-__-__T__:__:__%' THEN (TO_TIMESTAMP(REPLACE("OH"."createddate", 'T', ' '), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AT TIME ZONE 'JST'
        ELSE NULL
    END AS "createddate"
FROM "opportunityhistory" AS OH;

Error:
Error: PREVIEW_FAILED
Error ID: 864a2967-c0be-4162-b490-aae51006de7c
Orientation: prod_cloud_os_eu
Error occurred on query preview. Preview execution failed: INVALID_FUNCTION_ARGUMENT: Failed to tokenize string [Y] at offset [0]

#SAP Signavio Process Intelligence

entry.title: IS: Cannot create iFlow in Test tenant. Error while loading the details of existing integration flow
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have setup my test/trial BTP account with Integration Suite / Process runtime. While my setup looks perfectly fine (have doublechecked all the steps), I still cannot create a new Integration Flow inside a package. When I press either 'Add' or 'Add and Open in Editor', nothing happens, no visual feedback (nor an error displayed) and iFlow is not created.

On the other hand, trying to open an existing (copied from pre-existing SAP content) iFlow, displays the following error:

"Error while loading the details of the integration flow. Try opening the artifact again. If the issue persists, report the incident to SAP."

I have checked the existing SAP notes and still cannot find anything meaningful to solve this.


Do you have any ideas ?
Appreciated,
Vil

entry.title: Re: Facing issue in SAP CPI trial version

On the old trial account every attempt to enter to own artifacts, or in "Discover" section causing error "Error while loading the details of the integration flow. Try opening the artifact again. If the issue persists, report the incident to SAP".

entry.title: Re: Instance creation failed - abap trial
entry.content:
Hi Gaurav,

you had two users in two different of the shared backend systems we use. One in the US region, one in the APJ region.

I deleted both users so that you should be able to try again.

Please make sure that there is no instance left.

See also my following blog post.

How to delete and re-create your ABAP environment ... - SAP Community

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: I have a business requirement in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Scenario Recap:

  • 1 Outbound Delivery with 4 Line Items (Products).
  • Each line item is picked from 4 different storage types.
  • The first two products (from one warehouse order) must be picked first and placed in a temporary intermediate storage bin until the second warehouse order is in a locked status.
  • Remaining 2 products are then picked and brought to same intermediate storage bin.
  • Finally, all products are packed into one HU (Handling Unit).
  • HU is then moved to staging area.Could you please guide me on how we can achieve this requirement?
  • SAP Extended Warehouse Management

entry.title: SAP MDK Create Media action failing on IOS platform for the Attachment Control.
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working with the SAP ODATA V2 API (API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV) to upload attachments in my MDK application. The attachment is getting uploaded on the Android device, but the same operation is failing on an iOS device. I'm using the Attachment Form Cell Control to upload the attachments, and I have created a CreateMedia OData action to handle the upload. I'm getting the below error when I try to upload an image: 

I have also attached the error log details and the Create Media action details. I hope this helps.

Thank you for your help.

Aditya

entry.title: Re: employee central core certification preparation
entry.content:
Good morning,

For any SAP certification you would like to pursue, there is a dedicated learning path available on the SAP Learning Hub. At the end of each course, you’ll find an official exam simulation provided by SAP to help you get familiar with the test format.

If you’re looking for additional practice questions and mock exams, there are also third-party platforms available in the market that offer this type of content.

Here are some useful links to help you get started:

https://learning.sap.com/browse

https://learning.sap.com/courses/sap-successfactors-employee-central-core

I personally took the LMS Certification Exam, but the structure is quite similar across most SAP certifications. Once you complete the SAP training, you’ll gain access to the simulation to help you understand how the real test works.

 

 

When you register for the official certification exam, you’ll have two attempts—so even if you don’t pass the first time, you’ll have another chance to try again.

Let me know if you need any additional support!

Best regards, Juliana Camile 🙂

entry.title: Re: Vendor Refund for AP Down Payment – Best Practice in...
entry.content:
Hi @nobin_1 ,

You could post a standalone AP Credit Note referencing the original Down Payment (using the Referenced Document option in the Accounting tab). Then, you record an Incoming Payment for a vendor, clearing the Credit you've posted, so the bank and BP would get adjusted.

Finally, when on the DP's relationship map, you'll end up with something like this:

I hope it helps.

BR,
Felipe

which outlines the standard design
